falsification_logic.confirm_like: Stacked void-wall transverse density cuts exhibit kurtosis above the Gaussian baseline, consistent with power-law-like wall tails.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: The stacked transverse profile is close to Gaussian and does not show the excess-tailed behavior expected from grain-boundary scattering.

notes: This is a public-proxy implementation using density-field minima as void seeds when full public void catalogues are not available in the runtime environment.
A positive proxy result should still be followed by a dedicated void-catalogue analysis.
